title: 200pcs Snap Fastener Kit, BetterJonny 15mm Heavy Duty Canvas Snap Button Stainless Steel Press Stud Cap with 3 Setting Tools for Boat Bag Leather DIY Craft
features: Size: The diameter of snap is approx. 15mm/0.59 inch
Convenient: These stainless steel snaps are stored in a plastic storage box with removable partitions for your convenience at any time
